preferences: UI means styling, layout, copy, and design judgment only. React logic and other mechanical work are impl work, not UI work.
Claude is for artistic and human-judgment work. Codex is for coding, debugging, refactoring, and other mechanical work.
Give each agent one clear role: research, planning, implementation, testing, audit, or cleanup. Do not mix roles unless the task is small.
Use the appropriate Paseo skills and the appropriate GAS personas and skills for each agent role.
When agents run in parallel, give them separate file or task scopes.
Never use @everyone in Paseo chat rooms.
Do not archive agents you did not spawn for the current run.
If a stalled agent should continue the task, reload it and send a message telling it to resume the work.
If the same fix fails twice, stop repeating it. Reassess, change approach, or handle the issue directly.
